title: Esterlon Network textures
description: A realistic texture pack that aims to imitate the style of North American cities.
body:
### A realistic texture pack that aims to imitate the style of North American cities, created for the Esterlon Network server.

You will need connected textures enabled for the texture pack to work.

If you are playing in Fabric, you will need the Mod QDAA, for the pack to not look crunchy and grainy.

To access all the features available in the pack, you will need to have the mod World edit.
